title: Bridge Essay: Empathy boosts the comprehension of nonverbal behavior.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Social Incarnation — intersubjectivity, embodied empathy, social predictive processing, second-person neuroscience.

**Empathy boosts the comprehension of nonverbal behavior.**. Soc Neurosci.. PMID: 41664527. DOI: 10.1080/17470919.2026.2626321. Empathy is afundamental component of social cognition, yet its influence on the neural processing of non-verbal cues in neurotypical populations remains insufficiently explored. Using EEG/ERPs, we examined empathy-dependent modulation of gesture recognition during acaption - gesture congruence task, manipulating face visibility in participants with high versus low Empathy Quotients (EQ).
